# Velvet Digital

Velvet Digital is a marketing agency for fine jewellery and interior design brands in Dubai and across the UAE (Abu Dhabi, Sharjah and the wider Gulf). We run brand, editorial content, Instagram, Google reviews, local SEO and performance marketing as a single practice — built in India, made to Gulf standards. The studio was founded by Yash Jain and Chetan Agarwal; the journal is written by Richa S. Our Dubai office is at 401, Office Park Building, Block E, Dubai Internet City, Dubai, United Arab Emirates; the studio itself works from Bengaluru, India. Retainers are AED 3,000 a month for a focused performance engagement, AED 5,000 for a middle scope, and AED 10,000 a month for a full brand-and-content programme, with add-ons from AED 5,000. We take a small number of new brands each quarter and start every relationship with a short, honest brand audit.

## Core pages

- [Marketing Agency Dubai](https://velvetdigital.io/marketing-agency-dubai/): Hub — how we work with jewellery and interior brands across Dubai and the UAE.
- [Jewellery Marketing Agency Dubai](https://velvetdigital.io/jewellery-marketing-agency-dubai/): Brand, content, social and local search for independent and family jewellery houses.
- [Interior Design Marketing Agency Dubai](https://velvetdigital.io/interior-design-marketing-agency-dubai/): Positioning, portfolio and lead work for interior studios and practices.
- [Instagram Content for Jewellers](https://velvetdigital.io/jewellery-marketing-agency-dubai/instagram-content/): Instagram run as an editorial publication — editorial stills and macro film.
- [Google Reviews for Jewellers](https://velvetdigital.io/jewellery-marketing-agency-dubai/google-reviews-for-jewellers/): Google Business Profile optimisation and a compliant review system.
- [Jewellery SEO](https://velvetdigital.io/jewellery-marketing-agency-dubai/jewellery-seo/): Local and on-site SEO to be found by high-intent jewellery buyers.
- [Best Jewellery Marketing Agencies in Dubai (2026)](https://velvetdigital.io/best-jewellery-marketing-agencies-dubai/): An honest guide to Dubai jewellery marketing agencies and who each is best for.

## More

- [Services](https://velvetdigital.io/services/): The six disciplines we run.
- [Journal](https://velvetdigital.io/journal/): Notes on luxury digital marketing for jewellery and interiors.
- [Contact](https://velvetdigital.io/contact/): Request a brand audit.
